assumption: Fresh workspace — no existing code to conflict with. All files are new creates.
basis: ls workspace shows only .env.forge and .git — no source files

assumption: PostgreSQL is available via TEST_DATABASE_URL from .env.forge for integration tests.
basis: docker-compose.forge.yml sets up DB; .env.forge provides TEST_DATABASE_URL

assumption: Platform uses FastAPI+SQLAlchemy+Alembic stack (consistent with all other p1pause projects).
basis: Other p1pause trackers (p1pause-1776604840541) use this exact stack
